meta.aesthetic: The Operating Record, brand-inked — ledger-modern paper/grid structure carrying the Anamata brand palette (navy/white, coral + sky accents) and Poppins
meta.extends: design/bas-design-system/colors_and_type.css (Anamata Design System, pinned 2026-07-16 — local decision-time snapshot, gitignored pending license confirmation; canonical copy in the internal repo)

concept.statement: Anna in your face, on the record — the site opens with Anna as the product and every page still carries the live, typeset operating record of the AI team that runs it.
concept.mood: A QA lab notebook rebranded by the mothership: cool brand-white paper, deep navy ink, the logo's steel-blue for interactive elements, one hot coral for the ask, sky-blue trace lines. Daylight and calm in a category that hides in dark mode.
subjectWorld: Anna — the digital AI assistant, wireframe becoming human
approval gate and named human approvers
QA and quality-engineering heritage (Anamata — Quality from the Heart)
graph paper, hairline rules, ledger typography, stamps
concept.audienceFeeling: Bam, dit is Anna — this is real and it is running right now; wonder wrapped in reassurance, for skeptical Dutch/EU enterprise buyers.
avoid: generic robot/brain/neural-network clip-art (the Anna wireframe-portrait hero is the one sanctioned figurative image, decided 2026-07-15)
pill badge above centered hero H1
fabricated ledger data in production — the record must always be real

signature.element: Anna resolving from wireframe to human on scroll, above the real audit ledger
signature.location: Hero: scroll-scrubbed wireframe→face portrait; persistent bottom record strip on every page; provenance blocks on articles
signature.implementation: Hero scrubs 33 pre-extracted frames (600x900) as the visitor scrolls — the face gains skin, the page brightens; fallback is the static split-face portrait. Ledger consumes the real audit trail. Mono entries type on; human approvals appear as rotated teal stamps with the approver's name.
signature.boldnessBudget: Navy ink on brand-white paper; steel-blue (#2C548C, the logo's Ai blue) is the working interactive color; coral is spent ONLY on the primary ask (offerte/contact CTAs); sky-blue only as non-text highlight (wireframe, grid, underlines, fills). Teal is reserved for approval events. Display type, the resolving face and arriving ledger entries are the only loud elements.

imagery.direction: The Anna wireframe→human portrait (assets from Bas via ChatGPT: 33-frame sequence + static split-face fallback, white background, sky-blue wireframe) is the single figurative image on the site. Everything else stays typeset real data with geometric artifacts only: punch holes, stamps, hairline rules, graph-paper grid underlay (navy at 6% opacity, 32px cells). No stock photography, no illustration sets.
sources: anna-face frame sequence: local 33-frame source (600x900) — converted to WebP frames by scripts/build-hero-frames.mjs, source never committed
anna-split-face: local static portrait (1024x1536) — metadata-stripped WebP fallback ≤200KB
wordmark: public/anamata-ai-logo.svg (Ai in #2C548C) — metadata scrubbed before shipping

layout.composition: Ruled ledger sheet: fixed marginalia column (132px) carrying mono record numbers (001, 002, ...) and micro-labels, separated by a hairline; content column to its right. Sections are numbered records divided by 2px ink rules. A persistent record strip is pinned to the bottom viewport edge. The hero is a full-viewport sticky stage for the Anna scrub before the ledger sheet begins.
layout.wireframe:
| HERO: Anna wireframe→face, sticky, scroll-scrubbed          |
| 001 | WHAT ANNA DOES ............ |
| 002 | HOW IT WORKS ... [stamp]    |
| 003 | PROOF: OPERATING RECORD ... |
| 004 | CONFIGURATOR EXIT ........  |
[ LAST ACTION 14:08 · ... ✓ ON RECORD ]
layout.rhythm: 32px graph-grid underlay; 1px hairlines between rows; 2px ink rules between numbered sections; generous 56-72px section padding

colors._comment: Brand mapping (design/bas-design-system): text=navy-900, primary=navy-700 (the logo's Ai blue), secondary=coral (CTA only), accent=sky-200 (non-text highlight only — fails contrast as text on white), semantic.success=darkened brand teal for stamp/small text (true teal #00B3A6 allowed as fill/dot), semantic.info=sky-400. Provisional pending QUESTIONS-design-system-2026-07-16.md (internal repo).

weightPairing.display: As shipped (S1, Ezra-approved visually): the hero H1 is Poppins 200 (ExtraLight) UPPERCASE tracked 0.04em (clamp(3.2rem, 7.2vw, 6.4rem), line-height 1.05); section and subpage headings are Poppins 300 (Light) SENTENCE-CASE (clamp up to 4.5rem). The DS voice prescribes uppercase display throughout — sentence-case section headings are the provisional shipped choice (one-line-reversible: drop text-transform / raise weight), pending Bas Q2 (vs .eu's bold-700). One accent word may carry primary color.
weightPairing.emphasis: Poppins 600 (card names, kickers); mono 600 for stamps, buttons and mono labels

borders._radiusComment: Squareness is part of the ledger grammar and matches the brand's 2-4px sharpness: 2px buttons/stamps, 3px cards, nothing rounder. 'full' exists only for punch holes and the recording pulse dot.

shadows._comment: One hard offset shadow (card stock on paper) — never soft blur, never the DS's dark-mode glow (that token is navy-world only).

animations.choreography: Two systems. (1) HERO SCRUB, scroll-driven: sticky viewport stage; scroll progress 0→1 maps linearly to frames 0→32 of the Anna sequence while a white veil lightens from 12% to 0 ('light brightening') and the portrait stage eases perspective(1200px) rotateY(-6deg→0deg) — the decided 'rotates on scroll', no 3D runtime; H1 and kicker are fixed over the stage; last 15% of the stage cross-fades the resolved face into section 001. (2) LEDGER, time-driven on entry into view: entries fade/rise sequentially (650ms stagger, 500ms each); each approval stamp scales in rotated -2deg with spring easing 450ms after its entry; a primary-blue caret blinks on the final line. The recording dot pulses at 2.2s. Section reveals below the hero: single 350ms rise on first intersection, nothing continuous.

hero.library: none — IntersectionObserver + rAF + preloaded WebP frames (~40 lines vanilla JS, no animation dependency)
hero.reducedMotionStrategy: show-final-state: static split-face portrait (wireframe|human), no scrub, no veil; same for no-JS and for viewports < 760px if frame preload exceeds budget

accessibility._notes: Ink #041524 on paper #FAFAFA ≈ 17:1 ✓. Primary #2C548C on paper ≈ 7.6:1 ✓ text-safe. Muted #5A7080 ≈ 4.9:1 ✓. Approval #067E75 ≈ 4.8:1 ✓ (true teal #00B3A6 ≈ 2.5:1 — fills/dots only, never text). Coral #E15857 vs white ≈ 3.6:1 — coral-filled buttons only at ≥18px bold white text; smaller buttons use ink fill. Sky #8AD9FF — never text on white.

components.header: Paper bg, 1px hairline bottom. Wordmark: anamata_ai6.svg (navy word, Ai in #2C548C), height 28px; '.AI' suffix retired — it lives in the mark. Mono nav links 12.5px, ink at 82%, primary on hover.
components.button-primary: Solid ink #041524, paper text, mono 600 13px uppercase tracking 0.05em, 12x22px padding, 2px radius. Hover: #2C548C. (Mirrors live .eu's navy button.)
components.button-hot: Offerte/contact ask only: solid coral #E15857, white text, mono 700 ≥18px uppercase, 14x28px padding, 2px radius. Hover: #C94847. Max one per viewport.
components.button-ghost: Transparent, primary #2C548C text + 1px primary border, primary-button metrics. Hover: primary at 7% fill.
components.marginalia: 132px left column, hairline right border. Record number mono 600 13px primary; labels mono 10.5px ink at 55%, tracking 0.08em. Collapses to horizontal strip above content < 760px.
components.transparency-notice: Art. 50 disclosure as feature: 1px primary border with 4px left edge, '§50' glyph, mono kicker 11px primary tracking 0.08em, body 13.5px. Mandatory on every page (may be condensed in footer on subpages).
components.ledger: 2px ink top rule. Head row: mono 11.5px 600 tracking 0.14em + approval-teal 'RECORDING' pulse dot (fill may use #00B3A6). Entries: grid 150px/1fr/auto, mono 13.5px, 1px hairline dividers. Timestamps primary at 70%, agent names primary 500, A2A arrows ink at 60%.
components.approval-stamp: Mono 600 10.5px uppercase tracking 0.12em, #067E75 text + 1.5px #067E75 border, 2px radius, rotated -2deg, spring scale-in.
components.record-strip: Fixed bottom, ink #041524 bg, paper text, 2px sky #8AD9FF top border, mono 12px. 'LAST ACTION' tag sky #8AD9FF, checkmark #7FD4C8. Present on every page.
components.personnel-card: White card stock, 1px ink border, 3px radius, hard offset shadow, punch-hole circle top-right (14px, 2px ink ring, paper fill). Kicker mono 10.5px primary 600; name Poppins 600 26px; mono field rows with hairline dividers, keys at 55% opacity. Pending state: dashed border, 55% white fill, no shadow.
components.okr-bar: 8px tall, 1px ink border, 2px radius, primary fill, width transition 1.1s; mono 12px primary percentage line below.
components.provenance-block: (Insights pages) condensed ledger footer per article: drafted-by, approved-by (named human), published — same entry grammar as hero ledger.
components.demo-form: (Contact + configurator offerte) styled as 'file a request': mono labels, paper inputs with 1px ink borders, 2px radius; submission confirmation renders as a new ledger entry.
components.rings-diagram: (About page) concentric permission rings as primary-blue SVG line art on paper — inner/middle/outer annotated in mono; no fills, hairline strokes.
components.configurator: Component picker as ledger order form: each module (Anna, CV-tool, couplings/plugins) a white card-stock row with mono spec fields and a square checkbox stamp; running 'order record' column mirrors picks as ledger entries; NO prices anywhere; exit = button-hot 'Vraag offerte aan' which files the request as a form submission.
components.commit-widget: (Peter's techie element — stays) live commit/deploy feed in ledger grammar, mono 13.5px, real data only.
